title: stelis splendens
intro: Stelis splendens, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to reduce inflammation and treat various respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis splendens are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Stelis splendens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and flu.
